title: FOOD PANTRY AND SOCIAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL REDMOND CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND SOCIAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes. Home deliveries for food provided for people in some instances. Provides rent, mortgage, and utility assistance (water, electric, propane, and heat) no more than once per year. Provides other financial assistance depending on specific needs. Individuals and families can receive vouchers for clothing, outdoor living gear, and household goods. 651 SW Veterans Way Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Income no higher than 200% of the Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Food Pantry: Wednesday/Thursday 10am-1:30pm, Tuesday 2pm-5:30pm Social Services: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Email (541) 923-5264 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 923-5264 Main phone (541) 923-7622 FAX Main phone (541) 923-5264 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in for food pantry and voucher room. Call or email for financial assistance. Resources are limited and provided on a first-come, first-served basis. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Redmond School District (Cities of Crooked River Ranch, Redmond, Terrebonne and Tumalo). Does not serve Cities of Bend, La Pine, Madras, Sisters, Powell Butte or Prineville. SITE HOURS: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From Highway 97, turn east onto Veterans Way. Proceed past Walgreens on the right and go over the railroad tracks. Located on the left. Services: Clothing Vouchers Electric Service Payment Assistance Food Pantries Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Household Goods Vouchers Rent Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL REDMOND CONFERENCE
